clips.prompt: Cinematic silhouette shot in slow motion. A lone armored warrior figure walks away from camera through a massive stone archway filled with bright golden sunrise backlight. The figure is entirely a dark silhouette against the glowing entrance — no detail visible, just the outline of armor and a cape. Dust particles and volumetric light beams fill the air around the silhouette. Anamorphic lens flares at the light source. Warm-cool contrast — cool blue stone interior in foreground, hot golden backlight beyond the arch. Cinematic color grade, film grain, 24fps. Ancient Roman setting, no modern details, no text, no logos.
